feedback.text: I would like to consider adding statements that would protect consumers from anti-consumer actions like 'killing' games. We as consumer community using entertainment software like computer games are victim of planned obsolescence of products We already paid for. Those aren't isolated cases as you can see on this list: https://stopkillinggames.wiki.gg/wiki/Dead_game_list I propose adding something that would force game developers after ending game support to release source/ adding possibility to run game without their online services that often are just microtransactions and are not essential to run given application. With Regards Łukasz
